channel.title: Weapons a MTF might use
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Weapons a MTF might use" - Looking for sniper rifles, combat rifles, and maybe pistols.

item.title: Re: Weapons a MTF might use
item.content:encoded: When dealing with some hardier anomalies, Mtf's may use anti-vehicle weapons instead of anti-personel. Like an rpg-7 for cost-effectiveness or a m203 grenade launcher for a underbarrel option for their m4 carbine or m16. Also a masterkey could be effective for breaking and entering during combat operations. Perhaps task forces may have access to weapons and tools of an anomalous nature.

item.title: Re: Weapons a MTF might use
item.content:encoded: One of my favorite RPG settings back when (Alternity Dark•Matter) had a very similar organisation to the Foundation. Standard issue equipment included a pistol using caseless frangible ammunition (which I've been told isn't realistic) that leaves no evidence and a card with their lawyer's number on it.

item.title: Re: Weapons a MTF might use
item.content:encoded:
Depending on the mission, the MTF may not even use real life weapons. This is just my headcannon, but I can see Foundation agents (IE, members of a MTF) using weapons that are made to subdue it's targets as opposed to injurer them. Ideas include sniper riffles that shoot tranquilizer darts, a riffle that shoots a compressed net that can engulf anyone when fired, or even some sort of sci-fi lazier stun gun.

Not an expert on gun models, but thought you should be aware of your options

item.title: Re: Weapons a MTF might use
item.content:encoded:
Lazy answer, just use US military surplus (e.g., M4 carbines, M24 sniper rifles, also Google scout sniper rifles and designated marksman rifles) or things police use ubiquitously (Glocks), unless they're in a region where those would be conspicuous.

Personal writing advice, the specific model of weapon Does. Not. Matter. Unless the exact gun is a key story point (and I struggle to even think of an example), there is almost never any situation where saying "FN SCAR" makes for a better story just saying "rifle." It's irrelevant to what people actually like about MTF stories, which is the personal narrative.1

(Most gear-fetishising articles focus on anonalously modified weaponry, e.g. GOC formats and Samsara.)

If you really want a deeper answer, a bunch of people have tried to make lists before:

+ show block
– hide block

http://www.scp-wiki.net/forum/t-1044949/mtf-equipment
http://www.scp-wiki.net/forum/t-9475668/mtf-equipment
http://www.scp-wiki.net/forum/t-1647602/mtf-equipment
http://www.scp-wiki.net/forum/t-1441678/weaponry-used-by-the-foundation
http://www.scp-wiki.net/forum/t-120531/foundation-weapons
http://www.scp-wiki.net/forum/t-753594/foundation-weaponry
http://www.scp-wiki.net/forum/t-3416367/equipping-the-armed-mobile-task-forces
http://www.scp-wiki.net/forum/t-1209460/foundation-equipment
http://www.scp-wiki.net/forum/t-120531/foundation-weapons
http://www.scp-wiki.net/forum/t-1081754/scp-foundation-weaponry
http://www.scp-wiki.net/forum/t-9922517/what-are-the-foundation-s-weapons
http://www.scp-wiki.net/forum/t-11517555/what-re-the-mtf-weaponry-repost
http://www.scp-wiki.net/forum/t-11259883/my-ideas-for-mtf-infantry-equipment

Footnotes
1. If you waste a bunch of time and effort picking a gun, best case scenario, you'll impress a few gun buffs and barely impact your rating. Worst case scenario, you'll look like you're trying too hard or don't know what you're talking about, resulting in downvotes.

item.title: Re: Weapons a MTF might use
item.content:encoded:
A good choice for a midrange sniper is the Remington 700 series. It is used by the U.S. Army under the name M24 Sniper Weapon System.

A good choice for the semiautomatic pistol would be a Sig Sauer 229

item.title: Weapons a MTF might use
item.content:encoded:
Could anyone tell me some weapons a MTF might use?

I am looking for midrange snipers.
I would also like to have some suggestions on rifles, especially lighter models.
Also, I would like a suggestion on a fast firing but semiautomatic pistol.

I am requesting this so I have a good idea of what weapon I could use in my tale about a MTF in action, and a personal project of mine.

Thank you!

Edit: If possible, I would like have a selection of 3 or more weapons falling under the categories I have written. Thank you!
